title: PublishedRecord
description: Response body for GET /hash/{isin}. Contains the canonical tier hashes, structural flags, sourcing, and where-to-find hints for any field the canonical record itself does not carry an explicit value for. No client data is involved.

schema_version.description: static-validator schema version this record was computed under (e.g. '0.1').

asof.description: Date this canonical record was last refreshed.

canonical_field_status.description: What the canonical record holds per field. Tells clients which fields they can rely on us for vs which they need to source elsewhere.

^(coupon|day_count|frequency|maturity_da.description: explicit = canonical has a confirmed value; derived = computed from other fields per SCHEMA.md §4; default = canonical uses the schema default; unknown = canonical has no value, hashes that depend on it are omitted.

confidence.description: Confidence in the canonical record per SCHEMA.md §5 of the launch plan: high = 3+ independent sources agree, medium = 2 sources, low = 1 source.

where_to_find.description: For fields where canonical_field_status is 'unknown' or 'default', hints for where a client can source a confirmed value.
